basic_details.job_title: AIASL Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: AI Airport Services (AIASL) Chief Executive Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIASL. Applications are invited from eligible candidates for the post of Chief Executive Officer under contractual engagement. This recruitment offers an excellent opportunity for experienced professionals seeking a senior leadership role in the aviation industry.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 57 years (relaxation up to 62 years for candidates with 3 years of Ground Handling experience, and up to 65 years for contract period)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 57 years. Age relaxation is applicable up to 62 years for candidates with 3 years of Ground Handling experience. Further relaxation up to 65 years is applicable for the contract period.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA OR equivalent Post Graduate Management Degree/Diploma OR Graduate Degree OR Graduate Engineer OR CA OR CMA with 20 years of Managerial Experience out of which at least 5 years of experience at senior managerial level in aviation industry.
qualification.details: Chief Executive Officer: MBA OR equivalent Post Graduate Management Degree/Diploma, Graduate Degree, Graduate Engineer, CA, or CMA. Experience: 20 years of Managerial Experience out of which at least 5 years of experience at senior managerial level (not more than two levels below CEO/Head of the Institution) in the aviation industry.

salary_details.details: Fixed Gross Emoluments: Rs.3.00 lakhs per month Special Allowance: 20% of gross emoluments HRA: 30% of (Fixed Gross Emoluments + Special Allowance)

selection_process: Two tier process Personal interview(s) of shortlisted candidates
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIASL Chief Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24 June 2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIASL Chief Executive Officer - Internal Job 2026 Notification PDF
Download AIASL Chief Executive Officer - External Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIASL Chief Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Chief Executive Officer position at AI Airport Services Limited is 24th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the CEO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA or equivalent Post Graduate Management Degree/Diploma, a Graduate Degree, a Graduate Engineer, CA, or CMA.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for the Chief Executive Officer role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 20 years of managerial experience is required, with at least 5 years in a senior managerial role within the aviation industry.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the AIASL CEO recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 57 years, with relaxations available for specific experience categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Chief Executive Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed gross emolument of Rs. 3.00 lakhs per month, plus special allowance and HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for candidates with Ground Handling experience?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with 3 years of Ground Handling experience can receive an age relaxation up to 62 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIASL CEO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a two-tier approach, including personal interviews for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. How should applications be submitted for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via post to the specified address, superscribing "Application for the post of CEO, AIASL".

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contract basis for the Chief Executive Officer position at AI Airport Services Limited.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
